executions.sql: SELECT    kommunenummer,    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE    kommunenavn = 'Drammen';

SELECT    teig.teigid AS teig_id,    teig.areal,    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM    matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE    teig.areal > 5000    AND ST_Intersects(teig.omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[10.1,59.1],[10.2,59.1],[10.2,59.2],[10.1,59.2],[10.1,59.1]]]]}'), 25833)));
